phase_marker.description: This file contains codegen rules that should only be executed in Phase 4 or later

function_signature.description: All generated code must follow the standard function signature

inputs.description: Dictionary mapping port names to values

meta.description: Dictionary containing context (graph, templates, node_id, etc.)

outputs.description: Dictionary mapping output port names to values

file_organization.description: Code generation must produce single-function-per-file structure
rules: Each functional node becomes a separate Python file
Each file contains exactly one function
Function name matches node ID or template ID
File name matches function name with .py extension

import_constraints.description: Restrictions on imports in generated code

requirements: Function must be at module top level
Type hints required for parameters and return
Return error dict on failure: {'error': str, 'error_type': str}

error_handling.description: Standardized error handling in generated code

pattern.try: Wrap main logic in try block
pattern.except: Catch specific exceptions, fallback to Exception

rules: Use typing module for type hints
Validate input types at function start
Use isinstance checks for type validation

requirements: Function must be importable as module
No side effects that prevent testing

guidelines: Consider lazy evaluation for large datasets

required_sections: Return value with type and description
